'''Biris J. Te Gaf''' was the senior purchasing agent for the [[Galactic Federation of Free Alliances|Galactic Alliance]] [[Engineering Support]] network on [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]].

==Biography==
Te Gaf was responsible for the purchasing of cannon packs, which had been the subject of numerous complaints in the fleet due to frequent misfires. When [[Darth Caedus|Jacen Solo]] inquired about the cannon packs, he was told that the random sampling showed the packs to perform adequately. Feeling that only adequate equipment was not good enough for the [[Galactic Federation of Free Alliances|Galactic Alliance]] forces, Solo ordered Te Gaf to be assigned to the [[Ocean (starship)|''Ocean'']] to see for himself the trouble such packs caused in the field.<ref name="Sacrifice" />

==Appearances==
*''[[Legacy of the Force: Sacrifice]]'' {{1st}}
